- [ ] `make format lint typecheck test` all pass locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated (offline & deterministic; integration tests marked)
- [ ] Docs / ADR updated if behaviour or a decision changed
- [ ] Honest-analytics principle respected (no target leakage; synthetic/simulated
      artefacts clearly labelled)
